full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23331

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23331.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
python3-awscrt-0.27.2-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
python3-awscrt-0.27.2-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/python-awscrt-0.27.2-2.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[0.27.2-2]
- Add patch fixing FIPS mode crash in awscli2
  Resolves: RHEL-131280
